title: [IMDCE] Remove pure instances when all output ports are dead
body:
```scala
circuit Top:
  module PassThrough:
    input a: UInt<1>
    output b: UInt<1>
    b <= a
  module Top:
    input a: UInt<1>
    output b: UInt<1>
    inst p1 of PassThrough
    inst p2 of PassThrough
    p1.a <= a
    p2.a <= a
    b <= p2.b
```
Current output:
```verilog
module Top(
  input  a,
  output b
);

  wire _p1_b;
  PassThrough p1 (
    .a (a),
    .b (_p1_b)
  );
  PassThrough p2 (
    .a (a),
    .b (b)
  );
endmodule
```

We should remove instance `p1` as `_p1_b` has no user and `p1` doesn't have any sideeffect.
